headline: 2 Reasons to Watch PFE and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Pfizer currently trades at $25.89 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 2.7%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.8% gain during that period.

headline: SPHD Pays Monthly Income Without Fail Since 2012; Here’s What Could Break the Streak
summary: The Invesco S&P 500 High Dividend Low Volatility ETF (NYSEARCA:SPHD) sends income to shareholders every month, with distributions rising roughly 23% in 2025 and 2026 monthly payouts climbing to around $0.208 per share, with a current 30-day SEC yield of 4.5%. The question is whether that income rests on a durable foundation or whether recent ... SPHD Pays Monthly Income Without Fail Since 2012; Here’s What Could Break the Streak

headline: Fed Hawks Now Rule. Will Warsh Go Along with Them?
summary: As Kevin Warsh steps up to lead the Federal Reserve, the case for interest-rate cuts is disappearing. Plus, investment newsletter commentary on AI”s circular ecosystem, emerging markets, and SpaceX.
